name: Vocal Plate
explanation: A bright, dense studio plate reverb in the EMT 140 lineage — the classic vocal and snare plate, brighter and longer than an algorithmic Dattorro plate. An input diffusion chain (four series allpasses) feeds a lightly-modulated figure-of-eight tank (two allpasses and two long delays with high-frequency damping) for a lush, shimmering metallic-to-smooth tail. Controls: dry/wet Mix, Decay, Tone (brightness), Pre-Delay and plate Size.
